rows.label: qev085603_MSG0001
rows.name:
Elma-san...
Were there always this many native creatures in this forest?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085603_MSG0002
rows.name:
There's definitely been an increase.
I wonder if it has something to do with these plants.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085603_MSG0004
rows.name: And that makes the fourth one complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085603_MSG0005
rows.name: The data collection is finished, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085603_MSG0006
rows.name: It seems our mission isn't quite over yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085603_MSG0007
rows.name: Do you think Doug-san's team is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085603_MSG0008
rows.name: Yes, they are likely being attacked by these enemies as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085603_MSG0009
rows.name:
Bring it on mo!
Lin-san and the others will take you on mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085603_MSG0010
rows.name: Stop relying on others to do the fighting![ST:wait ]
